miscfeatures.config.title: JulieISBaka MISC FEESHURZ
miscfeatures.config.developer_mode.label: DEV KITTEH MODE
miscfeatures.config.developer_mode.toolt: Wen enabled, max radius iz no longer capped by UI.
Open dis screen again after toggle change to refresh dev-only thingz.
miscfeatures.config.verbose_logging.tool: DEV KITTEH MODE must be on for dis to werk.
miscfeatures.config.anvil.auto_insert_ar: Wen on, /anvil auto-putz main-hand armor into slot 1.
Only if main hand item iz armor and slot 1 iz empty.
miscfeatures.config.anvil.auto_insert_we: Wen on, /anvil auto-putz main-hand wepun or tool into slot 1.
Includes damageable toolz/wepunz, bowz, crossbowz, and tridentz.
miscfeatures.config.anvil.auto_insert_na: Wen on, /anvil auto-putz main-hand name tag into slot 1.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.allow_negati: Wen on, enchant levelz below zero are accepted.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.allow_high_l: Wen on, enchant levelz above 255 are accepted as unsafe dev behavior.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.prevent_crea: Prevent creative packet crash on unsafe magikz
Wen on, negative and >255 enchants are blocked for creative targetz to avoid known packet boomz.
Turn off if u want full unsafe chaos and accept crash risk.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.fix_high_lev: Fixes enchant tooltip levelz above 10 so dey show readable text instead of raw translation keyz.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.high_level_s: Use Roman style for levelz above 10
Switches fixed big-level enchant display between numeric and Roman numerals.
miscfeatures.config.max_search_radius.to: DEV KITTEH MODE removes UI cap, but command still obeyz configured value.
miscfeatures.config.max_search_radius.no: In normal mode dis setting iz capped at %s.
miscfeatures.config.search_unloaded_chun: Wen off, /find block skips blockz in chunkz not already loaded.
Wen on, /find block may force chunk access beyond currently loaded area.
Wen off, /find item skips containerz in chunkz not already loaded.
Wen on, /find item may force chunk access beyond currently loaded area.
Wen off, /find entity only inspects mobbies in already loaded chunkz.
Wen on, /find entity may load chunkz in range before scanning mobbies.
miscfeatures.config.max_search_results.t: Limits how many /find block matchez are printed per block or tag target.
Total count still reported even when list iz truncated.
miscfeatures.config.max_item_search_radi: DEV KITTEH MODE removes UI cap, but command still obeyz configured value.
In normal mode dis setting iz capped at %s.
miscfeatures.config.max_find_item_result: Limits how many container matchez /find item printz per item or tag target.
Total item and container countz still reported even when list iz truncated.
miscfeatures.config.max_entity_search_ra: DEV KITTEH MODE removes UI cap, but entity searches still only operate on loaded mobbies in current world.
Entity searches only operate on loaded mobbies in current world.
miscfeatures.config.max_find_entity_resu: Limits how many entity matchez /find entity printz per entity or tag target.
Total count still reported even when list iz truncated.
